configuration-properties.doc:name: Config Properties
configuration-properties.doc:description: Loads application properties including HTTP port and downstream System API host/port configuration

http:listener-config.name: HTTP_Listener_config
http:listener-config.doc:name: HTTP Listener Config
http:listener-config.doc:description: HTTP listener configuration for customers-orders-prc-api on port ${http.port}

http:request-config.name: Customer_Sys_API_Request_config
http:request-config.doc:name: Customer Sys API Request Config
http:request-config.doc:description: HTTP request configuration for calling the customer-sys-api System API on port 8083

http:request-config.name: Orders_Sys_API_Request_config
http:request-config.doc:name: Orders Sys API Request Config
http:request-config.doc:description: HTTP request configuration for calling the orders-sys-api System API on port 8084
